test_cases.test_case: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
test_cases.expected_result: authenticates and redirects to Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Username field blank and submit
steps: 2. Fill the Password field with <valid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Username field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Password field blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <valid username>
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with invalid credentials
steps: 1. Fill the Username field with <invalid username>
2. Fill the Password field with <invalid password>
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed: 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to login with locked out user
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with empty Username
steps: 2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Epic sadface: Username is required.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with empty Password
steps: 1. Enter a valid username in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Epic sadface: Password is required.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with invalid credentials
steps: 1. Enter an invalid username in the Username field
2. Enter an invalid password in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with locked out user
test_cases.expected_result: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with long Username
steps: 1. Enter a long string (200+ characters) in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Login attempt is blocked; error message is shown indicating the username is too long.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with special characters in Username
steps: 1. Enter special characters (e.g., '!@#$%^&*()') in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Login attempt is blocked; error message is shown indicating invalid username.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt login with leading/trailing whitespace in Username
steps: 1. Enter '   standard_user   ' in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed; user is authenticated and redirected to Product Inventory page.

test_cases.test_case: View Product Details
steps: 1. Click on the product name or image in the Product List
test_cases.expected_result: opens Product Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Add Product to Cart
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' button for a product
test_cases.expected_result: adds item to cart

test_cases.test_case: Remove Product from Cart
steps: 1. Click 'Remove' button for the product in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: removes item from cart

test_cases.test_case: Sort Products by Name A-Z
test_cases.expected_result: Products are sorted in ascending order by name

test_cases.test_case: Sort Products by Price Low-High
test_cases.expected_result: Products are sorted in ascending order by price

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add product to cart without selecting an item
steps: 1. Navigate to the Product Inventory page
2. Click 'Add to cart' without selecting any product
test_cases.expected_result: No product is added to cart; 'Add to cart' button remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to remove product from cart without selecting an item
steps: 1. Navigate to the Product Inventory page
2. Click 'Remove' without having any product in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: No product is removed from cart; 'Remove' button remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly click 'Add to cart' twice
preconditions: Product is available in the inventory
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' for a product
2. Immediately click 'Add to cart' again for the same product
test_cases.expected_result: Second click is blocked; only one item is added to the cart, and the cart badge count updates accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly click 'Remove' twice
steps: 1. Click 'Remove' for a product in the cart
2. Immediately click 'Remove' again for the same product
test_cases.expected_result: Second click is blocked; product remains removed from the cart, and the cart badge count updates accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long product name
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the 'Name' field of a new product
test_cases.expected_result: Form accepts the long name or shows an error indicating the name is too long

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in the product description
steps: 1. Enter a string with special characters in the 'Description' field of a new product
test_cases.expected_result: Form accepts the special characters or shows a specific error indicating invalid characters

test_cases.test_case: Add product to cart
test_cases.expected_result: The cart state updates to reflect the added product

test_cases.test_case: Navigate back to products
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to shopping cart
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to Shopping Cart

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add a product to the cart when the cart is already full
test_cases.expected_result: Action is blocked; cart state remains unchanged; error shown indicating 'Cart is full'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate back to products without any products in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to Product Inventory page; cart state remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to navigate to shopping cart without any items added
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to Shopping Cart; message displayed 'Your cart is empty'

test_cases.test_case: Rapid consecutive Add to cart / Remove actions
preconditions: Product is available for adding to cart
test_cases.expected_result: 'Add to cart' action succeeds, followed by 'Remove' action also succeeding; cart state updates accordingly.

test_cases.test_case: Back to products navigation after adding to cart
preconditions: Product has been added to cart
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to Product Inventory page without duplicating the product in the cart.

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to Shopping Cart from Product Detail
test_cases.expected_result: Navigates to the Shopping Cart page displaying the product added.

test_cases.test_case: Continue Shopping from Shopping Cart
test_cases.expected_result: returns to Product Inventory

test_cases.test_case: Begin Checkout from Shopping Cart
test_cases.expected_result: begins checkout process

test_cases.test_case: Remove Item from Shopping Cart
steps: 1. Click Remove button for an item
test_cases.expected_result: Item removed from cart

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to continue shopping without any items in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: User remains on the Shopping Cart page; no items are returned to the Product Inventory

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to checkout with no items in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: User remains on the Shopping Cart page; no checkout process begins

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to remove an item that is not in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: No action occurs; the item is not removed and remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Rapid re-submission after redirect from Continue Shopping
preconditions: User has items in the cart
steps: 2. Press the browser back button immediately after redirection
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory without the cart being pre-filled with items

test_cases.test_case: Remove Item from Cart and check cart status
preconditions: User has items in the cart
steps: 1. Click Remove on an item in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: The item is removed from the cart; remaining items are displayed correctly

test_cases.test_case: Submit valid checkout information
steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
2. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
3. Enter <valid zip/postal code> in the Zip/Postal Code field
test_cases.expected_result: User proceeds to the overview step

test_cases.test_case: Cancel checkout information
test_cases.expected_result: User returns to the Shopping Cart

test_cases.test_case: Leave First Name blank and submit
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Last Name blank and submit
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Last_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Zip/Postal Code blank and submit
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Zip_Postal_Code field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave all required fields empty and submit
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name field indicating it is required; Inline validation error appears on the Last_Name field indicating it is required; Inline validation error appears on the Zip_Postal_Code field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with First Name filled, Last Name and Zip/Postal Code empty
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in the First Name field
2. Leave the Last Name field empty
3. Leave the Zip/Postal Code field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: 'Error: Last Name is required'

test_cases.test_case: Submit with Last Name filled, First Name and Zip/Postal Code empty
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in the Last Name field
2. Leave the First Name field empty
3. Leave the Zip/Postal Code field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: 'Error: First Name is required'

test_cases.test_case: Submit with Zip/Postal Code filled, First Name and Last Name empty
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in the Zip/Postal Code field
2. Leave the First Name field empty
3. Leave the Last Name field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: 'Error: First Name is required'

test_cases.test_case: Submit with leading/trailing whitespace in First Name
steps: 1. Enter '   John   ' in the First Name field
2. Enter a valid value in the Last Name field
3. Enter a valid value in the Zip/Postal Code field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; saved value for First Name shows 'John' without extra spaces

test_cases.test_case: Submit with special characters in Last Name
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in the First Name field
2. Enter '@Doe!' in the Last Name field
3. Enter a valid value in the Zip/Postal Code field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; saved value for Last Name shows '@Doe!'

test_cases.test_case: Complete the order successfully
preconditions: Order summary is displayed with items and totals
test_cases.expected_result: The order is completed and navigates to the confirmation page

test_cases.test_case: Cancel the checkout process
preconditions: Order summary is displayed with items and totals
test_cases.expected_result: Exits checkout

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to finish the order without any payment or shipping information
steps: 1. Leave the Payment Information section blank
2. Leave the Shipping Information section blank
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; order is not completed; error shown indicating that payment and shipping information are required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to cancel the checkout
test_cases.expected_result: User is exited from checkout; no order is completed

test_cases.test_case: Rapid re-submission after redirect
preconditions: Payment and shipping information are filled
steps: 1. Click the Finish button to complete the order
2. Immediately press the browser back button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the confirmation page without a second order being created

test_cases.test_case: Cancel checkout and ensure exit
test_cases.expected_result: User exits checkout and is returned to the previous page without any order being processed

test_cases.test_case: Return to Product Inventory from Confirmation Page
test_cases.expected_result: returns to Product Inventory and clears the cart

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to return to Product Inventory without a valid order
test_cases.expected_result: User remains on the Confirmation Page; no cart is cleared; confirmation message is still displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Rapid re-submission after redirect
preconditions: User has completed the checkout process and is on the confirmation page.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page; the cart is cleared and no duplicate order confirmation appears.

test_cases.test_case: User successfully logs out
test_cases.expected_result: ends the session and redirects to the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to logout while not logged in
steps: 1. Ensure the user is not logged in
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is not performed; user remains on the current page and is not redirected

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to logout when not logged in
test_cases.expected_result: Logout action is blocked; user remains on the current page with no session ended.

test_cases.test_case: Logout after rapid consecutive clicks
steps: 2. Immediately click the Logout button again
test_cases.expected_result: First logout action succeeds; user is redirected to the login page, and the second click has no effect.

test_cases.test_case: Reset App State functionality
test_cases.expected_result: clears the cart and resets in-app state

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to reset app state without any preconditions
steps: 1. Click the Reset App State button
test_cases.expected_result: The app state does not reset; the cart remains unchanged
